BatchGetIncidentFindings.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about specified findings for an incident record

CreateReplicationSet.description: Grants permission to create a replication set

CreateResponsePlan.description: Grants permission to create a response plan

CreateTimelineEvent.description: Grants permission to create a timeline event for an incident record

DeleteIncidentRecord.description: Grants permission to delete an incident record

DeleteReplicationSet.description: Grants permission to delete a replication set

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete resource policy from a response plan

DeleteResponsePlan.description: Grants permission to delete a response plan

DeleteTimelineEvent.description: Grants permission to delete a timeline event

GetIncidentRecord.description: Grants permission to view the contents of an incident record

GetReplicationSet.description: Grants permission to view the replication set

GetResourcePolicies.description: Grants permission to view resource policies of a response plan

GetResponsePlan.description: Grants permission to view the contents of a specified response plan

GetTimelineEvent.description: Grants permission to view a timeline event

ListIncidentFindings.description: Grants permission to list findings for an incident record

ListIncidentRecords.description: Grants permission to list the contents of all incident records

ListRelatedItems.description: Grants permission to list related items of an incident record

ListReplicationSets.description: Grants permission to list all replication sets

ListResponsePlans.description: Grants permission to list all response plans

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to view a list of resource tags for a specified resource

ListTimelineEvents.description: Grants permission to list all timeline events for an incident record

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to put resource policy on a response plan

StartIncident.description: Grants permission to start a new incident using a response plan

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a response plan

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a response plan

UpdateDeletionProtection.description: Grants permission to update replication set deletion protection

UpdateIncidentRecord.description: Grants permission to update the contents of an incident record

UpdateRelatedItems.description: Grants permission to update related items of an incident record

UpdateReplicationSet.description: Grants permission to update a replication set

UpdateResponsePlan.description: Grants permission to update the contents of a response plan

UpdateTimelineEvent.description: Grants permission to update a timeline event

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
